name: Photoshop
supported_tasks: client-approved layer intent profiles with content-hash resume
local semantic layer decomposition and staged crop review
opt-in metrics-only GitHub Issue or Discussion feedback
explicit license-verified Wikimedia Commons regression datasets
candidate-only subject mask quality training with grouped validation
confirmed editable PSD assembly and reopen validation
unsupported_tasks: production-grade decomposition for every image style
automatic instance separation for heavily overlapping line art
safety_notes: Do not commit PSD files, source images, exported images, commercial fonts, brushes, or Creative Cloud caches.
Input and output paths must be passed as parameters.
Keep PHOTOSHOP_EXE and local asset paths outside the repository.
